name: mockup100-pod-customizer
description: Build helpers for the Mockup100 Print-on-Demand Customizer for WooCommerce WordPress plugin

scripts.check: node --check src/editor/main.js && node --check scripts/build-frontend.mjs && node --check scripts/serve-harness.mjs && php -l includes/class-mockup100-api-proxy.php && php -l includes/class-mockup100-settings.php && php -l includes/class-mockup100-product-binding.php && php -l includes/class-mockup100-rest-controller.php && php -l includes/class-mockup100-designer-page.php && php -l includes/class-mockup100-plugin.php && php scripts/test-rest-controller.php && php scripts/test-settings-and-binding.php
